dispatch_patterns.overview: Templates and contracts for dispatching sub-modes during Phase 2 execution orchestration. Every dispatch must follow the mandatory dispatch contract defined in the architect's customInstructions. These templates provide the specific structure for each sub-mode.

dispatch_template.description: Dispatch for a single scoped implementation unit.

required_fields.field: Task number from the staging document checklist.
Descriptive name matching the checklist item.
Full task specification from LLD including: - Function signatures and parameters - Interface definitions - File paths for each change - Dependencies on prior tasks
Testable conditions that define task completion.
Exact path to the staging document for shared context.
Explicit scope limits: what to implement and what NOT to implement.
Return via attempt_completion with: 1. Code-change summary (files created/modified with brief description). 2. Test results if applicable. 3. Any blockers encountered.

dispatch_template.example: Task 3: Create IngredientModel Specification: Create src/models/ingredient.py with dataclass IngredientModel. Fields: name(str), quantity(float), unit(str), expiry_date(Optional[date]). Methods: __eq__ comparing name+unit, __hash__ on name+unit, is_expired() -> bool. Acceptance: Unit test test_ingredient_equality passes. test_is_expired passes. Staging: docs/staging/T-WOL-8-data-model-migration-baseline.md Boundaries: Only create the model file and its test. Do not implement storage or migrations. Completion: attempt_completion with file list and test results.

dispatch_template.description: Dispatch for reviewing a completed implementation unit.

required_fields.field: Task number being reviewed.
Exact path to the staging document.
Specific LLD section or requirements for this task.
The implementer's completion summary (files changed, what was done).
Return via attempt_completion with: 1. Spec Compliance: PASS/FAIL. 2. Issues categorized by severity with file:line references. 3. Overall Assessment: Approved / Changes Required.

dispatch_template.description: Dispatch for independently verifying a completed and reviewed implementation unit.

required_fields.field: Task number being verified.
Exact path to the staging document.
Testable conditions from the task specification.
Suggested commands to verify each criterion (tests, build, etc.).
Return via attempt_completion with: 1. Verification Status: PASS/FAIL. 2. Per-criterion results with evidence (command output, exit codes). 3. Any regressions detected.

dispatch_template.description: Dispatch for final full-issue review after all tasks complete.

required_fields.field: Full issue scope — all tasks in the staging document.
Exact path to the staging document.
Combined summaries from all implementation units.
Holistic review: cross-task integration, overall architecture adherence, consistency.
Same format as per-task review.

re_dispatch_pattern.description: When re-dispatching implementer after review feedback.

required_fields.field: Reference to the original task specification.
The reviewer's exact issue list with file:line references and recommended fixes.
Current iteration number (1-3). After 3, escalate instead.
Fix ONLY the issues identified in the review. Do not expand scope.
